name: LEXINFINTECH ADR/2 CL.A
summary: Lexinfintech Holdings Ltd. operates as an online consumer finance platform in China, providing access to credit and other financial services to young adults. The company offers installment purchase options and personal loans through its online platforms. TICKER: Lexinfintech Holdings Ltd. operates as an online consumer finance platform in China, providing credit and financial services to young adults through installment purchase options and personal loans.
